issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, limiting robustness.

scenarios.name: incremental-github-events-with-schema-contract
scenarios.rationale: Response A never mentions dlt or a resource; Response B defines a dlt.resource but uses the wrong incremental field and omits the required event_type column.

scenarios.name: hubspot-declarative-rest-api-source
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric, while Response A omits key details such as base_url, auth token reference, pagination, write_disposition, and primary_key.
